_comment: LBNL FDD single-duct AHU (SDAHU) point name -> CAMBER Role mapping. A second BAS naming convention (vs the per-building examples), proving the role/mapping layer is vendor-neutral: adding a dataset is a config file, not a code change. Dataset: LBNL Fault Detection and Diagnostics Datasets (CC-BY). Note this AHU has a cooling coil only (no heating valve), so heat-coil rules are correctly gated out by completeness validation.
